{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323040512A256D04EAE6E6F8594BB"}"},"total":264},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7170324380827337510","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写的还算不错，就是有些地方细节刻画的不太好，都是草草转场看的不太连贯。。这些都是我个人感觉哈，请作者大大您不要介意哈，您加油更新哈。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1669471353,"group_id":"7168030906630802467","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"青春就该挥洒汗水，给点阳光就该灿烂点。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NyySTXGObRxhvtpotsoOHXRSGwgndflxzASQ3eFq2xOv","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/46752badfc7145b2afdcb09eb711c082~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776794419&x-signature=AyuFZCwyxYMv5tZTfKKImGM8TNo%3D","user_id":"2229418465168382","user_name":"伍籽菇凉"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2229418465168382","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7168030906630802467","book_info":{"abstract":"苏青穿越到九叔世界，成为茅山小师弟，师兄是林凤娇，石坚，四目道长等人。
即将下山之际，激活了系统，获得最强剑体混沌剑体，以剑入道，拥有超强的剑道天赋。
剑道功法，更是看一眼便掌握，一出手便拥有至高剑道，令茅山掌门师父震惊。
茅山衰落，被圆觉寺的和尚抢走了香火，师父求着要将茅山的未来托付给苏青。
......
苏青下山后不久，圆觉寺的和尚为了彻底的压制茅山，决定将茅山灭门追杀茅山弟子，在茅山各位师兄心如死灰之际，苏青强势逆转局面......","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b057c24e93ab496a39f7699073acf9fd","author":"陪我看日出","author_id":"","book_id":"7168030906630802467","book_name":"茅山：我九叔师弟，茅山剑祖","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#182810","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3043人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":539,"name":"悬疑脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=539&name=悬疑脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":100,"name":"灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=100&name=灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":80,"name":"剑道","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=80&name=剑道&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":383,"name":"九叔","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=383&name=九叔&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":522,"name":"打脸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=522&name=打脸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7168033010879889958","read_count":"3043","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"618553"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.2","serial_count":"302","tags":"悬疑脑洞,系统,穿越,剑道,灵异,九叔,打脸,同人,悬疑","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/856602f2963c10169c2d3f2ebeca39b1~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779393912&x-signature=aairA%2BlDO4v1icasOVUhnQ15%2
